mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qr_code_queue (data_id, queue_type, content_json, status, created_time) VALUES (#{dataId}, #{queueType}, #{contentJson}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, data_id, content_json, refresh_count FROM qr_code_queue WHERE queue_type = 1 AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_time ASC LIMIT 100
SELECT id, data_id, content_json, fail_reason, created_time FROM qr_code_queue WHERE queue_type = 2 AND status = 4 ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM qr_code_queue WHERE data_id = #{dataId} AND queue_type = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qr_code_current_processing (data_id, content_json, refresh_count) VALUES (#{dataId}, #{contentJson}, #{refreshCount})
mapper.select: SELECT data_id, content_json, refresh_count FROM qr_code_current_processing
SELECT id, data_id, content_json, status, created_time FROM qr_code_queue WHERE queue_type = 1 and status=1 ORDER BY created_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qr_code_queue WHERE status = 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qr_code_queue WHERE status = 3 AND created_time < #{cutoffDate}
SELECT id, data_id, content_json, created_time, updated_time FROM qr_code_queue WHERE status = 3 AND created_time < #{cutoffDate} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT id, data_id, content_json, created_time, updated_time FROM qr_code_queue WHERE status = 3 ORDER BY created_time DESC
